result.stdout:
AWS Schedule Expression Validator CLI

Usage:
  aws-schedule-expression-validator format <expression>
  aws-schedule-expression-validator validate <expression> [--min <timespan>] [--max <timespan>]
  aws-schedule-expression-validator occurrences <expression> [--count <number>] [--start <iso-8601>]

Examples:
  aws-schedule-expression-validator format "rate(5 minutes)"
  aws-schedule-expression-validator validate "cron(0 10 * * ? *)" --min 00:05:00 --max 01:00:00
  aws-schedule-expression-validator occurrences "rate(5 minutes)" --count 3
